name: mcp-issue-loop
description: Work through GitHub issues labelled ready-for-ai in an Umbraco MCP repo, driving each to a CI-green PR. mcp-issue-loop has two modes: LOCAL (orchestrated worktrees + parallel subagents + local tests + review loop + capture hooks) and CLOUD (one session per issue, no worktree, CI as the test gate — no local Umbraco — build to a green PR and stop). Also bundles rework-loop (reacts to the PR-review event: addresses requested changes, re-greens CI, re-requests review; never merges) and content-issue-loop + triage-learnings. Repo-agnostic.
